title: Loki and the Holy Knights
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Ripley, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Saul, Unknown person #12 as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that brings today's history lesson to a close!

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: Everyone, show these guys around school!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes, ma'am!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Okey- Dokey!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Mr. Cap'n, you look different from that all white look you had before. What's the deal?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was looking forward to seeing you like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah that? That's me at my freest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You assembled a legendary warrior from the old fables of Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ooh.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It made my heart skip a beat.:) I'm from the last generation of Elbaf warriors, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, so you've pretty much already heard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It came up when we were trying to escape egghead alive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's how we ended up here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you know how I couldn't stop worrying about those books...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After seeing all the scholars dying to save them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I went back to ohara with hajrudin and the others.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was overcome with tears when I saw how many of them survived. Each one a tiny spark of hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DERSHI SHI SHI SH!! FEAST YOUR EYES! Isn't it amazing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Any book you bring in here, gets gigantified!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Welcome to the mysterious 'Owl Library'!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the books we rescued from Ohara 22 years ago can be found here!

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: Now, Robin, be careful.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Watch what happens to that book you're holding as we enter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: OWAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What AAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is the world's greatest library.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All these books, giant sized! It's marvelous, don'tcha think?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We made sure not to miss any of them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Not a single one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Do you like books?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Woooah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought I'd have the privilege of showing you this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The realm of the dead

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess you've also got nothing but free time, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, am I disturbing you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Nah, I welcome a good disturbance.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have nothing to do but kill time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that moment of true fear you mentioned before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is that still what motivates you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... even now, when I think about it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I can't stop the trembling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ditto, it's so frustrating...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Snow Transponder Small (Voice recognition and Cold resistant Type)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We've been friends for a long time,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But for one reason or another...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We've never actually met face to face...

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
